name: Fragment of Allurement
descs:
Activates when using E.G.O Skills that inflict [Laceration] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Bleed'.

Gain Final Power equal to (Lust E.G.O resource + sum of other E.G.O resources/3) consumed and deal +50% damage

Lust E.G.O Skills: Inflict additional [Laceration] Count based on E.G.O grades Before Attack(ZAYIN inflicts +2 Count, TETH inflicts +3 Count, HE inflicts +4 Count, and so on) and deal additional Lust damage equal to [Laceration] Potency on target
